sqlReaderQuery.value: @concat('select * from tblsalesdata where sale_date > = ''',formatDateTime(pipeline().parameters.pstartdate,'yyyy-MM-dd'), ''' and sale_date <= ''', formatDateTime(pipeline().parameters.penddate,'yyyy-MM-dd'), '''')

ifFalseActivities.name: FolderNotFound

source.sqlReaderQuery: select Convert(varchar,watermarkvalue,127) as oldwatermark from  dbo.WatermarkTable where Tablename = 'InsuranceClaims'
select max(LastModifiedTimestamp) as latestwatermark from dbo.InsuranceClaims

text.value: update dbo.WatermarkTable set WatermarkValue = '@{variables('newwatermarkvalue')}' where Tablename = 'InsuranceClaims'

sqlReaderQuery.value:
SELECT * FROM InsuranceClaims 
WHERE LastModifiedTimestamp > '@{variables('oldwatermarkvalue')}'
 AND LastModifiedTimestamp <= '@{variables('newwatermarkvalue')}'
SELECT * FROM dbo.InsuranceClaims where CAST(claimdate AS DATE) = '@{pipeline().parameters.process_dt}'
